# MuleSoft HTTP Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (1.11) of HTTP Connector documentation.
> See [HTTP Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the HTTP Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [HTTP/2 Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-2-support.md)
- [About HTTP Connector Migration](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-about-http-connector-migration.md)
- [Route HTTP Requests to Different Paths Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-conn-route-diff-paths-task.md)
- [Configuring Basic Security Filter for HTTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-basic-security.md)
- [Using Anypoint Code Builder to Configure HTTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-config-acb.md)
- [HTTP Connector Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-examples.md)
- [Configuring HTTP Polling Source](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-polling-source-ref.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure HTTP Connector 1.11](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-studio.md)
- [HTTP Connector 1.11 - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [HTTP Connector XML Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-connector-xml-reference.md)
- [Consume a REST Service Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-consume-web-svc-task.md)
- [HTTP Connector 1.11 Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-documentation.md)
- [HTTP Error Status Code and Reason Phrase Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-error-status-reason-phrase-task.md)
- [Configure HTTP Listener Source](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-listener-ref.md)
- [Load a Static Resource Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-load-static-res-task.md)
- [Post a Form Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-post-form-task.md)
- [Route Requests Based on an HTTP Method Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-route-methods-based-task.md)
- [Start an App from a Browser Example](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-start-app-brows-task.md)
- [Troubleshooting HTTP Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/http-troubleshooting.md)
- [HTTP Connector 1.11](https://docs.mulesoft.com/http-connector/latest/index.md)
